def negative_python_perf_layer_io_operations_path_exists_before_open_race():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_io_operations_path_exists_before_open_race"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: I/O operations. Flag exists/stat checks immediately followed by open when exception handling can avoid duplicate syscalls."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
